data: {"generalSituation":"An easterly airstream will affect the coast of southern China today and tomorrow. The weather will be brighter over the region, but there will still be a few showers. Under the persistent influence of troughs of low pressure, the weather over southern China will be unsettled during the Easter holidays and Ching Ming Festival. There will be occasional showers and squally thunderstorms. With the troughs of low pressure weakening and the anticyclone aloft strengthening, showers will ease off gradually and the weather will improve over southern China midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260401","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"North force 3 to 4, force 5 at first. Becoming east force 3.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with one or two showers.
